metadata.description: Don't go into production without these - methodologies to stop burning Claude Code tokens, drifting in long sessions, and blowing up sub-agent costs. Extracted from 6 months of practitioner notes.

plugins.name: survival-kit
plugins.description: Three flagship skills that auto-trigger to prevent cost blowups and planning drift: subagent-matrix (model x effort cost guardrails with tripwire escalation), plan-mode-review (three-layer input review with P0/P1/P2 tagging), context-cost-guard (4-source token accumulation model plus cache TTL mechanics).
